name: Ceramic Bowl Set
description: A set of three nesting ceramic bowls, perfect for serving or display. Glazed in a beautiful earthy sage green and speckled brown rim. Food, microwave, and dishwasher safe.

name: Macrame Wall Art
description: Large bohemian style macrame wall hanging, hand-knotted with 100% natural cotton cord on a sustainably sourced natural driftwood branch. Adds warmth and texture to any wall.

name: Hand-dyed Scarf
description: Luxuriously soft mulberry silk scarf, hand-dyed with plant-based indigo and madder root. Each scarf features a unique tie-dyed shibori pattern.

name: Custom Guitar
description: Handcrafted parlor-size acoustic guitar made with a solid sitka spruce top and mahogany back and sides. Bright, balanced tone and beautiful natural satin finish.

name: Lavender Soap Set
description: Set of four artisanal cold-process soaps scented with pure French lavender essential oil and infused with organic lavender buds for gentle exfoliation.

name: Watercolor Print
description: High-quality giclée print of an original watercolor landscape painting depicting a misty mountain forest. Printed on archival, textured fine art paper.

name: Silver Turquoise Ring
description: Stunning handcrafted sterling silver ring featuring a hand-cut natural turquoise stone with beautiful copper matrix. Size 7.

name: Wooden Serving Board
description: A stunning charcuterie serving board crafted from a single slab of live-edge black walnut wood. Finished with food-safe mineral oil and organic beeswax.
